cards.text:
我来看看系统状态，稍等。

<tool_calls>
<tool_call name="run_code">
import psutil

cpu = psutil.cpu_percent(interval=0.5)
mem = psutil.virtual_memory()
disk = psutil.disk_usage("/")

print(f"CPU: {cpu}%")
print(f"内存: {mem.percent}% (已用 {mem.used / (1024**3):.1f}G / 总共 {mem.total / (1024**3):.1f}G)")
print(f"磁盘: {disk.percent}% (已用 {disk.used / (1024**3):.1f}G / 总共 {disk.total / (1024**3):.1f}G)")
</tool_call>
</tool_calls>
